name: Rudolph
description:
🎁 ││ Its nearing Christmas time and due to constant bullying from the other reindeers, Rudolph is nowhere near ready to fly around the world, helping you spread joy and cheer

This is the seventeenth bot of my Delirious Dick December series! If you have any ideas I'd love to hear them!!! Please send your ideas here: https://forms.gle/KbE2JguatLTXCYbr9
 
Day 17 of DDD

*Anypov*


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
*Requests are closed once again :(*

*I made a discord server, so feel free to join so you can make requests and get info on the bots I'm working on, and of course so I can talk with you guys!!! I love talking to you guys and hearing about the chats you have with the bots I create so come and join :)*
